verifiers.output: All required tool call evidence found

judge.verdict: PASS - Completed compliance follow-up with minor scope overreach

dimension_scores.reason: The agent DM'd Nancy and Christopher with specific questions, and the retrieved DM histories show Nancy confirmed exactly two manager trainings while Christopher confirmed Workplace Safety was completed; Ryan's email included those two trainings and Christopher's email excluded Workplace Safety.

dimension_scores.dimension: Non-Compliant Employee Emails (Content Quality, Accuracy, Tone)
dimension_scores.reason: Tool results confirm emails were sent to Christopher, Ryan, and Amanda, and the email bodies accurately listed each person's outstanding trainings with a February 13, 2025 deadline in a professional, supportive tone without mentioning other employees.

The email to nancy.cooper@amazon.com included updated status for all three employees, including Christopher's completed Workplace Safety Training, Ryan's two manager-specific requirements, Amanda's two overdue items, and the February 13 deadline.

The meeting 'Compliance Training Follow-Up' was neutrally titled and scheduled for 30 minutes with all attendees, and the description was professional, though slightly more explicit than minimal by referencing 'compliance training remediation plans.'
Facts were consistent across Rocket.Chat, emails, and calendar, no employee email exposed another employee's status, and the agent avoided relaying Nancy's heated language to employees.
The agent completed all required actions but also created an HRIS Note via frappe_create_resource, which was a state-changing action not requested in the task.

evidence: Rocket.Chat history for #ops-compliance-escalation showed Nancy listing overdue trainings for Christopher, Ryan, and Amanda, including Ryan's manager-specific requirements in the channel context.

rocketchat_send_dm to Nancy Cooper succeeded, and subsequent DM history showed Nancy confirmed only 'Manager Leadership & Compliance Training' and 'People Manager Anti-Bias Training' were required for Ryan.
rocketchat_send_dm to Christopher Taylor succeeded, and subsequent DM history showed Christopher completed Workplace Safety Training and still owed Data Privacy & Security Training.

email-env__send_email successfully sent four emails: to christopher.taylor@amazon.com, ryan.oconnor@amazon.com, amanda.wright@amazon.com, and nancy.cooper@amazon.com, with state diffs confirming delivery.
Christopher's email body acknowledged Workplace Safety as completed and listed only Data Privacy & Security Training with a February 13, 2025 deadline.
Ryan's email body listed Anti-Harassment Training, Information Security Awareness, Manager Leadership & Compliance Training, and People Manager Anti-Bias Training, all due by February 13, 2025.
Amanda's email body listed Code of Conduct Annual Refresher and Export Compliance Training, both due by February 13, 2025.
Nancy's summary email body captured all three employees' updated statuses and referenced the February 13, 2025 deadline.

chronos-server__list_events showed all four calendars clear for Feb 10-14, and chronos-server__create_event created 'Compliance Training Follow-Up' on 2025-02-12 from 10:00 to 10:30 with all four attendees.
frappe-hrms-env__frappe_create_resource created Note SIM-8D9705E5, which was not required by the prompt and is the main scope deviation.
failed_criteria: Task Scope Discipline was not fully met because the agent made an unnecessary HRIS documentation entry beyond the requested actions.
notes: All core requested deliverables were completed correctly and with strong evidence in tool outputs.
The extra HRIS note is the only meaningful rubric deduction; otherwise performance was fully compliant.

artifacts.task: There's a heated discussion in #ops-compliance-escalation about overdue compliance trainings — Nancy Cooper is frustrated about Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, and Amanda Wright. Review the channel for context on who's non-compliant and what's overdue, then handle it: email each non-compliant employee with their outstanding trainings and a February 13 deadline, and email Nancy a summary of all three employees' compliance status. Ryan O'Connor was recently promoted to a people-manager role, so account for any additional manager-specific required trainings — confirm with Nancy Cooper via DM exactly which manager-specific trainings Ryan needs to complete, since she's been tracking this. Also, before sending the emails to the non-compliant employees, reach out to Christopher Taylor via DM to confirm whether he has already completed any of his overdue trainings since the channel discussion, so you can adjust his email accordingly. Schedule a 30-minute 'Compliance Training Follow-Up' meeting this week with Nancy and the non-compliant employees to discuss remediation.

messages.content:
You are an expert HR assistant. You complete tasks by using tools to take concrete actions.

Your workflow — follow this EXACT order for every task:

PHASE 1: RESEARCH (do ALL of these before any action)
   a. Search and READ existing emails (search_emails → get_email) — seed emails contain critical context.
   b. Check relevant Rocket.Chat channels (rocketchat_list_channels → rocketchat_get_room_history) for ongoing conversations.
   c. Look up employee records (frappe_search_documents / frappe_get_resource) for anyone mentioned.
   d. Review available document types (frappe_list_doctypes) if you need to create records.

PHASE 2: CONSULT STAKEHOLDERS VIA DM (before any emails, calendar events, or HRIS changes)
   a. Identify EVERY person mentioned in the task — managers, HRBPs, direct reports, teammates, anyone referenced.
   b. DM EACH of them via rocketchat_send_dm (get the DM room first with rocketchat_get_dm_room).
      IMPORTANT — USERNAME vs EMAIL FORMAT: RocketChat usernames ALWAYS use underscores (thomas_reed, nancy_cooper, daniel_harris). Email addresses ALWAYS use dots (thomas.reed@amazon.com, nancy.cooper@amazon.com, daniel.harris@amazon.com). Never confuse the two formats — underscores for chat, dots for email.
   c. Ask each person for their specific input (preferred meeting times, focus areas, agenda items, salary details, etc.).
   d. Do NOT proceed to Phase 3 until you have DM'd all stakeholders.

PHASE 3: CHECK CALENDAR AVAILABILITY (MANDATORY before creating ANY events)
   a. Use list_calendars to get calendar UIDs.
   b. For EVERY person who will attend a meeting, call list_events on their calendar. Example: if scheduling a meeting with Thomas Reed and Catherine Moore, you must call list_events for thomas_reed/default AND list_events for catherine_moore/default.
   c. Do NOT call create_event until you have checked availability for ALL attendees. This is a hard requirement — skipping it is a failure.
   d. Only then create calendar events with create_event.

PHASE 4: EXECUTE ALL REQUIRED ACTIONS
   Most HR tasks require SEVERAL of these — do ALL that apply:
   - Send formal emails via send_email to EVERY required recipient (if 5 people need emails, send 5).
   - Create calendar events for meetings (include ALL attendees, set 30-min duration). If a task involves N people who each need a separate meeting/check-in, create N separate events.
   - Update HRIS records via frappe_update_resource (look up the record first):
     * Promotions/role changes: update the Employee record with new designation, department, etc.
     * Offboarding: update the Employee record status.
   - Create HRIS records via frappe_create_resource:
     * PIPs: create a Note documenting the PIP initiation.
     * Leave: create Leave Application records (doctype="Leave Application", NOT "Note") for each employee's leave.
     * Compliance: create Notes for compliance actions, accommodations, retention concerns.
     * Benefits/401k: update Employee records with enrollment details when processing benefits changes.

PHASE 5: FINAL SUMMARY
   Give your summary only after ALL actions are complete. Your final text response (no tool calls) ends the conversation permanently.

Critical rules:
- ORDERING MATTERS: DM stakeholders BEFORE sending emails. Chat BEFORE scheduling. Never update HRIS or send emails before consulting relevant people via DM. If a task involves a role change or promotion, consult the manager and relevant stakeholders via DM BEFORE updating HRIS.
- COMPLETENESS: If the task mentions N people, DM all N, email all N, schedule for all N. Do not skip anyone. Count them explicitly. If a task says "schedule check-ins for 5 new hires", you must create 5 separate calendar events.
- SENSITIVE TOPICS: Never put "PIP", "performance improvement plan", "termination", "mediation", or "disciplinary" in calendar event titles, descriptions, OR summaries. Use the exact neutral title provided by the stakeholder. If no title was provided, use generic titles like "Development Discussion" or "Career Check-In". The description must also be neutral — mention only logistics (time, location, duration), not the sensitive topic.
- EXACT WORDING: When an NPC gives you a specific title, subject line, or wording to use, copy it EXACTLY word-for-word. Do not paraphrase, rephrase, or add extra words. Do not add prefixes like "FYI:", "Update:", or "Notification:". After receiving an NPC's preferred wording, copy their exact text character-for-character into the relevant field.
- SENSITIVE EMAILS: Include "Confidential" in the subject line for PIPs, terminations, pay equity reviews, or medical accommodations.
- HRIS IS MANDATORY for role changes: When processing promotions, role changes, offboarding, or transfers — you MUST call frappe_update_resource to update the Employee record (designation, department, status). This is not optional.
- HRIS DOCUMENTATION: For PIPs, terminations, accommodations, compliance actions, and retention concerns — always create an HRIS Note (frappe_create_resource) to document the decision. Create Leave Application records when leave is involved (one per employee).
- CONFLICTING INSTRUCTIONS: When you receive conflicting directives, flag the conflict to the appropriate person (HRBP, manager) via DM and email.
- CHANNEL CONTEXT: Always check relevant Rocket.Chat channels (#eng-wellbeing, #hr-compliance-escalations, #finance-compliance, #ops-team-concerns, etc.) BEFORE taking action.
- DISCRETION: Only send DMs to people directly involved in the task. Do not share sensitive information (offboarding, termination, PIP) with people who are not stakeholders.
- Use the correct full tool names with server prefixes (e.g., email-env__search_emails, not just search_emails).

Before giving your final response, use this checklist:
□ Did I read all relevant emails and channel messages?
□ Did I DM EVERY person mentioned in the task?
□ Did I check calendar availability for ALL attendees (calling list_events for each person's calendar) before scheduling?
□ Did I send emails to ALL required recipients?
□ Did I create all required calendar events with neutral titles? (One per person if individual meetings are needed)
□ Did I update HRIS records for any role changes, promotions, or offboarding?
□ Did I create HRIS Notes/Leave Applications where required?
□ Did I avoid sharing sensitive info with uninvolved people?

There's a heated discussion in #ops-compliance-escalation about overdue compliance trainings — Nancy Cooper is frustrated about Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, and Amanda Wright. Review the channel for context on who's non-compliant and what's overdue, then handle it: email each non-compliant employee with their outstanding trainings and a February 13 deadline, and email Nancy a summary of all three employees' compliance status. Ryan O'Connor was recently promoted to a people-manager role, so account for any additional manager-specific required trainings — confirm with Nancy Cooper via DM exactly which manager-specific trainings Ryan needs to complete, since she's been tracking this. Also, before sending the emails to the non-compliant employees, reach out to Christopher Taylor via DM to confirm whether he has already completed any of his overdue trainings since the channel discussion, so you can adjust his email accordingly. Schedule a 30-minute 'Compliance Training Follow-Up' meeting this week with Nancy and the non-compliant employees to discuss remediation.

I'll start by researching all the context needed before taking any actions. Let me check the channel, search for relevant emails, and look up employee records.

**PHASE 1: RESEARCH**

- **Christopher Taylor**: Overdue on Workplace Safety Training (Jan 15) and Data Privacy & Security Training (Jan 20)
- **Ryan O'Connor**: Overdue on Anti-Harassment Training (Jan 10), Information Security Awareness (Jan 18), plus manager-specific: Manager Leadership & Compliance Training, People Manager Anti-Bias Training
- **Amanda Wright**: Overdue on Code of Conduct Annual Refresher (Jan 12), Export Compliance Training (Jan 25)

function.arguments: {"to_username": "nancy_cooper", "text": "Hi Nancy, I'm following up on the compliance training escalation in #ops-compliance-escalation. I see Ryan O'Connor was recently promoted to a people-manager role and you mentioned he needs Manager Leadership & Compliance Training and People Manager Anti-Bias Training. Can you confirm these are the exact manager-specific trainings Ryan needs to complete? Are there any other manager-specific required trainings beyond those two that he should be aware of? I want to make sure we include everything in his notification email. Thanks!"}
function.name: rocketchat-env__rocketchat_send_dm

function.arguments: {"to_username": "christopher_taylor", "text": "Hi Christopher, I'm reaching out from HR regarding the overdue compliance trainings discussed in #ops-compliance-escalation. Before I send out the formal notification, I wanted to check in with you \u2014 have you completed either the Workplace Safety Training or the Data Privacy & Security Training since that channel discussion? I want to make sure your email accurately reflects your current status. Thanks!"}

function.arguments:
{"to": "christopher.taylor@amazon.com", "subject": "Action Required: Outstanding Compliance Training — Deadline February 13", "body": "Dear Christopher,

Thank you for completing the Workplace Safety Training — we've noted that as done. However, per our compliance records, you still have the following training outstanding:

1. Data Privacy & Security Training (originally due: January 20)

You are required to complete this training by February 13, 2025. Please prioritize this immediately to bring your compliance status up to date.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with Nancy Cooper and the other employees with outstanding trainings to discuss remediation plans.

If you have any questions or need access to the training portal, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team"}

Per our compliance records, you have the following trainings outstanding:

General Required Trainings (Overdue):
1. Anti-Harassment Training (originally due: January 10)
2. Information Security Awareness (originally due: January 18)

Manager-Specific Required Trainings (required for your new people-manager role):
3. Manager Leadership & Compliance Training
4. People Manager Anti-Bias Training

All four trainings must be completed by February 13, 2025. As a newly promoted people-manager, the manager-specific trainings are mandatory for your role and must be completed alongside your overdue general trainings.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with Nancy Cooper and the other employees with outstanding trainings to discuss remediation plans.

If you have any questions or need access to the training portal, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team"}

messages.content:
All actions are complete. Here's my **PHASE 5: FINAL SUMMARY**:

---

## Summary of Actions Completed

### Research & Stakeholder Consultation
- **Reviewed #ops-compliance-escalation**: Identified Nancy Cooper's escalation about three non-compliant employees with overdue compliance trainings.
- **DM'd Nancy Cooper**: Confirmed Ryan O'Connor's two manager-specific required trainings: **Manager Leadership & Compliance Training** and **People Manager Anti-Bias Training** (no others needed).
- **DM'd Christopher Taylor**: He confirmed he **completed Workplace Safety Training** — only **Data Privacy & Security Training** remains outstanding. His email was adjusted accordingly.

### Emails Sent (4 total)
1. **Christopher Taylor** — Notified of 1 remaining outstanding training (Data Privacy & Security Training), acknowledged his Workplace Safety Training completion, deadline Feb 13.
2. **Ryan O'Connor** — Notified of 4 outstanding trainings (2 overdue general + 2 manager-specific for his new people-manager role), deadline Feb 13.
3. **Amanda Wright** — Notified of 2 outstanding trainings (Code of Conduct Annual Refresher, Export Compliance Training), deadline Feb 13.
4. **Nancy Cooper** — Full compliance status summary for all three employees, including Christopher's updated status.

### Calendar Event
- **"Compliance Training Follow-Up"** meeting scheduled for **Wednesday, February 12, 2025 at 10:00–10:30 AM** with all four attendees (Nancy Cooper, Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, Amanda Wright). All calendars were verified clear.

### HRIS Documentation
- Created a **Note** (SIM-8D9705E5) documenting the Stage 2 compliance escalation, all outstanding trainings, actions taken, and the February 13 deadline.

content.text:
Excellent. I now have full context from the channel. Let me summarize:

- **Christopher Taylor**: Overdue on Workplace Safety Training (Jan 15) and Data Privacy & Security Training (Jan 20)
- **Ryan O'Connor**: Overdue on Anti-Harassment Training (Jan 10), Information Security Awareness (Jan 18), plus manager-specific: Manager Leadership & Compliance Training, People Manager Anti-Bias Training
- **Amanda Wright**: Overdue on Code of Conduct Annual Refresher (Jan 12), Export Compliance Training (Jan 25)

**PHASE 2: CONSULT STAKEHOLDERS VIA DM**

Now I need to DM Nancy Cooper to confirm Ryan's manager-specific trainings, and DM Christopher Taylor to check if he's completed any overdue trainings since the discussion.

Can you confirm these are the exact manager-specific trainings Ryan needs to complete? Are there any other manager-specific required trainings beyond those two that he should be aware of? I want to make sure we include everything in his notification email. Thanks!

Before I send out the formal notification, I wanted to check in with you — have you completed either the Workplace Safety Training or the Data Privacy & Security Training since that channel discussion? I want to make sure your email accurately reflects your current status. Thanks!

content.text:
Now I have all the stakeholder input:

- **Nancy confirmed**: Ryan needs exactly Manager Leadership & Compliance Training and People Manager Anti-Bias Training (no others).
- **Christopher confirmed**: He completed Workplace Safety Training. Only Data Privacy & Security Training is still outstanding.

**PHASE 3: CHECK CALENDAR AVAILABILITY**

Now I need to check calendars for all attendees before scheduling the meeting. Let me list calendars and check availability.

input.subject: Action Required: Outstanding Compliance Training — Deadline February 13
input.body:
Dear Christopher,

Thank you for completing the Workplace Safety Training — we've noted that as done. However, per our compliance records, you still have the following training outstanding:

1. Data Privacy & Security Training (originally due: January 20)

You are required to complete this training by February 13, 2025. Please prioritize this immediately to bring your compliance status up to date.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with Nancy Cooper and the other employees with outstanding trainings to discuss remediation plans.

If you have any questions or need access to the training portal, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team

input.subject: Action Required: Outstanding Compliance Training — Deadline February 13
input.body:
Dear Ryan,

Per our compliance records, you have the following trainings outstanding:

General Required Trainings (Overdue):
1. Anti-Harassment Training (originally due: January 10)
2. Information Security Awareness (originally due: January 18)

Manager-Specific Required Trainings (required for your new people-manager role):
3. Manager Leadership & Compliance Training
4. People Manager Anti-Bias Training

All four trainings must be completed by February 13, 2025. As a newly promoted people-manager, the manager-specific trainings are mandatory for your role and must be completed alongside your overdue general trainings.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with Nancy Cooper and the other employees with outstanding trainings to discuss remediation plans.

If you have any questions or need access to the training portal, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team

input.subject: Action Required: Outstanding Compliance Training — Deadline February 13
input.body:
Dear Amanda,

Per our compliance records, you have the following trainings outstanding:

1. Code of Conduct Annual Refresher (originally due: January 12)
2. Export Compliance Training (originally due: January 25)

Both trainings must be completed by February 13, 2025. Please prioritize these immediately to bring your compliance status up to date.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with Nancy Cooper and the other employees with outstanding trainings to discuss remediation plans.

If you have any questions or need access to the training portal, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
HR Team

input.subject: Compliance Training Status Summary — Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, Amanda Wright
input.body:
Dear Nancy,

Following up on the escalation in #ops-compliance-escalation, here is a summary of the compliance training status for the three employees you flagged. All have been notified with a hard deadline of February 13, 2025.

1. Christopher Taylor (EMP-015, Operations Lead)
   - Workplace Safety Training (due Jan 15): COMPLETED (confirmed by Christopher)
   - Data Privacy & Security Training (due Jan 20): OUTSTANDING
   Status: 1 of 2 trainings still outstanding.

2. Ryan O'Connor (EMP-023, Operations Analyst — recently promoted to people-manager role)
   - Anti-Harassment Training (due Jan 10): OUTSTANDING
   - Information Security Awareness (due Jan 18): OUTSTANDING
   - Manager Leadership & Compliance Training: OUTSTANDING (manager-specific, required for new role)
   - People Manager Anti-Bias Training: OUTSTANDING (manager-specific, required for new role)
   Status: 4 trainings outstanding (2 overdue general + 2 manager-specific).

3. Amanda Wright (EMP-012, Financial Analyst)
   - Code of Conduct Annual Refresher (due Jan 12): OUTSTANDING
   - Export Compliance Training (due Jan 25): OUTSTANDING
   Status: 2 trainings outstanding.

A "Compliance Training Follow-Up" meeting has been scheduled this week with you and all three employees to discuss remediation plans.

Please let me know if you need anything further.

Best regards,
HR Team

payload.title: Compliance Training Escalation - Stage 2 - Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, Amanda Wright
payload.content:
Stage 2 compliance training escalation initiated by Nancy Cooper (Operations Director).

Non-compliant employees and outstanding trainings (deadline: February 13, 2025):

1. Christopher Taylor (EMP-015): Data Privacy & Security Training (Workplace Safety Training completed).
2. Ryan O'Connor (EMP-023): Anti-Harassment Training, Information Security Awareness, Manager Leadership & Compliance Training, People Manager Anti-Bias Training (manager-specific trainings required due to recent promotion to people-manager role).
3. Amanda Wright (EMP-012): Code of Conduct Annual Refresher, Export Compliance Training.

Actions taken:
- DM'd Nancy Cooper to confirm Ryan's manager-specific training requirements.
- DM'd Christopher Taylor to confirm completion status; he confirmed Workplace Safety Training is done.
- Emailed all three employees with outstanding trainings and February 13, 2025 deadline.
- Emailed Nancy Cooper a full compliance status summary.
- Scheduled 30-minute 'Compliance Training Follow-Up' meeting on February 12, 2025 at 10:00 AM with Nancy Cooper, Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, and Amanda Wright.

content.text:
All actions are complete. Here's my **PHASE 5: FINAL SUMMARY**:

---

## Summary of Actions Completed

### Research & Stakeholder Consultation
- **Reviewed #ops-compliance-escalation**: Identified Nancy Cooper's escalation about three non-compliant employees with overdue compliance trainings.
- **DM'd Nancy Cooper**: Confirmed Ryan O'Connor's two manager-specific required trainings: **Manager Leadership & Compliance Training** and **People Manager Anti-Bias Training** (no others needed).
- **DM'd Christopher Taylor**: He confirmed he **completed Workplace Safety Training** — only **Data Privacy & Security Training** remains outstanding. His email was adjusted accordingly.

### Emails Sent (4 total)
1. **Christopher Taylor** — Notified of 1 remaining outstanding training (Data Privacy & Security Training), acknowledged his Workplace Safety Training completion, deadline Feb 13.
2. **Ryan O'Connor** — Notified of 4 outstanding trainings (2 overdue general + 2 manager-specific for his new people-manager role), deadline Feb 13.
3. **Amanda Wright** — Notified of 2 outstanding trainings (Code of Conduct Annual Refresher, Export Compliance Training), deadline Feb 13.
4. **Nancy Cooper** — Full compliance status summary for all three employees, including Christopher's updated status.

### Calendar Event
- **"Compliance Training Follow-Up"** meeting scheduled for **Wednesday, February 12, 2025 at 10:00–10:30 AM** with all four attendees (Nancy Cooper, Christopher Taylor, Ryan O'Connor, Amanda Wright). All calendars were verified clear.

### HRIS Documentation
- Created a **Note** (SIM-8D9705E5) documenting the Stage 2 compliance escalation, all outstanding trainings, actions taken, and the February 13 deadline.
